title: cleome gynandra var. nana
intro: Cleome gynandra var. nana, also known as spider flower or African cleome, is a compact, annual plant belonging to the Cleomaceae family. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cleome gynandra var. nana include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic and arthritic pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and valuable addition to natural remedies.
